author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Atlas Brew Meetup in San Diego!

We're hosting an Atlas Brew Meetup in San Diego, California!  

Come make friends, meet the team, and receive some Star Atlas goodies while celebrating the launch of Star Atlas CORE Act 2 and our participation in the Solana PlayGG event!

 Wednesday, July 19
 6:30PM - 8:30PM PDT
 Mission Brewery

If you're interested in attending, please sign up at the link below!

 | https://lu.ma/52llwz5z
